description: During a major network outage, connectivity to corporate email servers is often severed, making out-of-band cellular SMS gateways critical for alerting the NOC. A specification document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/sms_api_spec.txt. Read this document and configure the Custom SMS Gateway in ManageEngine OpManager using the provided Twilio API parameters (URL, HTTP Method, Headers, and dynamic Payload variables). Navigate to Settings > Notifications > SMS Gateway (or Settings > Basic Settings > SMS Gateway) to configure it. Credentials: admin/Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
